headline: Netflix Price Prediction: Why a 270% Jump By The End of 2027 Is Possible
summary: Our Netflix (NASDAQ:NFLX) 24/7 Wall St. price target is $327.08, well above where shares trade after a brutal April reset. With NFLX at $87.56, the implied upside of 273.55% is steep, and we rate the name a buy.
